original_image_tags: A weathered, off-white piece of paper with ragged, torn edges, showing two hole-punch marks at the top. The paper contains the typed text transcribed above. The background is dark, and a small blue rectangular box with white text reading "This image contains all the information on the document." is visible in the lower-left corner, partially obscuring the typed signature block.

elements.description: A typed document titled 'Report on a "Flying Saucer"'. The page contains body text describing an event on July 29, 1947, in Montana. There are punch holes at the top, minor damage along the edges, a faint red handwritten annotation at the bottom right, and a faint pink 'ENCLOSURE' stamp at the bottom right. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are visible.
